notes: Trees move (wind/leaves) and corrupt per-patch motion fits — exclude from pole solve and stack. Eves are static (no waving) so they're fine to leave in: they contribute no star detections, so the fit naturally downweights them. Eves occupy roughly the bottom half of row 6 across columns A–G plus all of H6.
pole_prior_notes: Initial guess for the celestial pole projection. Astrocam is roughly zenith-pointed at ~51°N, so the pole sits ~39° below zenith and projects into the bottom-right corner tile. Use as a Bayesian prior for per-patch pole fits: each patch's local pole direction should point toward H6; large disagreements indicate a noisy patch and should be downweighted.
